clusters.justification: These terms share macroscopic co-activation across paralimbic and limbic pathways, reflecting the broad, high-level processing of emotional valence, mood, and physiological arousal.

Subserved by frontostriatal and mesolimbic circuitry, these terms collectively represent the calculus of assigning subjective worth to environmental stimuli to drive motivated, goal-directed behavior.

Engaging the architecture of the default mode network, this axis binds the endogenous generation of internal representations regarding the self, interpersonal agents, and temporal autobiographical continuity.
